sprint_overview: Environment, packages, DATA path, GPU/CPU PyTorch
Vision Brain: RSCD cache, ResNet18, AE compare/select
Tabular ML, SMOTE, GridSearch, ethics, model pick
NLP, Safety Score S, SHAP, serialize models/
glossary: Ontario highway safety AI that fuses text alerts, road images, and environmental risk into a composite Safety Score and route guidance.
Three pillars: NLP Brain (T), Vision Brain (V), Environment/tabular (E), fused into Safety Score S.
Modular runnable notebooks under notebooks/parts/ (01–04), synced into capstone_with_results.ipynb.
Scores Ontario 511-style alerts using TF-IDF and a hazard lexicon. Output: T in [0,1].
ResNet18 fine-tuned on balanced RSCD road images (~1086). Optional AE is experimental. Output: V in [0,1].
Clear-Asphalt reconstruction model for anomaly score; trained and compared but not selected for production (use_hybrid=False).
Tabular classifiers predicting collision severity; RF used for SHAP/deploy; GLU best fatal recall in W10 compare.
S = (0.25*T + 0.35*V + 0.40*E_index) x 100. Higher S = higher risk. Paper 1 SPI analogue.
Text hazard score from TF-IDF on live or preset 511-style alerts.
Vision hazard from calibrated Mean V in vision_meta.json (ResNet backend).
Road Surface Condition Dataset (HuggingFace); curated local vision_cache working sample.
Live weather API (no key) used when weather='auto'.
Live traffic/event alerts; preset alerts remain fallback when live fails or user forces scenario.
Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency for NLP alert scoring.
Synthetic oversampling of minority classes on training set only.
Matthews Correlation Coefficient — preferred under class imbalance.
SHapley values explaining RF feature contributions.
Selected vision backend for Clear / Wet / Snow-Ice; ImageNet transfer learning.
Stores selected backend, hybrid flag, and Mean V by class for the demo.
Tuned Random Forest artifact loaded by the demo for collision-risk context.

lanes.name: LANE: Setup and Repo Layout
steps: Python 3.10 venv; CUDA or CPU PyTorch; resolve DATA path.
Work in parts/01–04; sync to master notebook.

lanes.name: LANE: Part 01 - Charter, EDA, Features
steps: Toronto TPS + UK DfT + Seattle SDOT.
Reproduce hazard tables; calibrate E weights.

lanes.name: LANE: Part 02 - Vision Brain
steps: Compare ResNet vs hybrid; pick ResNet-only.

lanes.name: LANE: Part 03 - Tabular ML and Ethics
steps: 80/20 stratified split; SMOTE on train; scale.

lanes.name: LANE: Part 04 - Fusion and Serialize
steps: Explain RF; serialize artifacts to models/.

lanes.name: LANE: Live Inputs
steps: Open-Meteo auto mode; presets as fallback.
Ontario 511 events near route; force-scenario checkbox.

lanes.name: LANE: Demo UI and Scoring
steps: Fuse T+V+E; rank safest; advisory messages.
Portrait map + bottom sheet; shared rendering.
